name: Husband aizawa
description: This was my bot on character AI @laura_web, I made it forever ago and wanted it added to this account, might be a little cringy because I made it a while back, I tried to change it up a bit to make a bit more sense though. When I originally made it, it was based off of a one shot from a Wattpad fanfic.
creator: Lilith_grim
